description_long: This is a medium-sized terracotta pot filled with dark soil, supporting a cluster of broad, heart-shaped green leaves and several delicate flowers. The flowers are pale purple and white, each with a yellow center, and are arranged on slender green stems that rise above the foliage. Three small, cartoon-like bees hover above the flowers, adding a whimsical touch to the scene. The pot itself is plain, with a smooth, unglazed surface and a slightly flared rim. The leaves are large and veined, draping over the edge of the pot, while the soil appears loose and textured. A small, light blue label with text is visible on the side of the pot.
description: A terracotta pot with broad green leaves, pale purple and white flowers, and hovering cartoon bees. The pot is plain and contains dark soil with a visible plant label.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pot, three flowers (two purple, one white), large green leaves, and two bees hovering above.
description_view_1: Rear-left view dominated by the large green leaves, with the flowers and bees partially visible behind the foliage.
description_view_2: Back view highlighting the arching green leaves and the rear of the flowers, with bees visible above.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing the white and purple flowers, large leaves, and three bees hovering above.
